name: Squarespace
description: Design-focused website builder with integrated CMS, e-commerce, and hosting

description.value: Design-focused website builder with integrated CMS, e-commerce, and hosting

cms-type.comment: Not a headless CMS; frontend is tightly coupled with templates

primary-language.comment: Backend built on Java; uses proprietary JSON-T templating

database-support.comment: Uses proprietary internal storage; not user-configurable

api-type.comment: Commerce APIs are REST-based; no GraphQL support

multi-tenancy.comment: Enterprise plan supports multi-site management from single dashboard

static-site-generation.comment: Dynamically rendered; no static export capability

edge-deployment.comment: Uses CDN for asset delivery; 99.9% uptime SLA for Enterprise

content-types.comment: Limited to predefined page types: Blog, Store, Events, Gallery, etc. No custom content type creation

custom-fields.comment: No custom fields system; limited to predefined fields per content type

field-types.comment: Basic field types within predefined content structures

nested-components.comment: Drag-and-drop blocks/sections can be nested within pages

localization.comment: No native multi-language; requires Weglot integration or manual duplicate pages

content-validation.comment: No custom validation rules for content fields

embedded-interactives.comment: Supports embedded code blocks, iframes, and third-party widgets

content-versioning.comment: No version history; saving publishes immediately for most pages

draft-publish.comment: Blog posts and collection items support draft status; page drafts require Enterprise

scheduled-publishing.comment: Blog posts and products can be scheduled

approval-workflows.comment: 'Needs Review' status available but no formal approval workflow

audit-logging.comment: Limited activity tracking; shows who is editing but no detailed audit log

media-library.comment: Asset Library stores images and videos; documents require separate upload

image-transformations.comment: Automatic responsive image serving (100w-2500w variants), WebP conversion, lazy loading

external-media-storage.comment: Media stored on Squarespace CDN only; no external storage integration

video-support.comment: Native video hosting with tiered storage limits (30min to unlimited by plan)

svg-support.comment: Only JPG, PNG, GIF supported; SVG requires code injection workaround

role-based-access.comment: Roles: Owner, Administrator, Website Editor, Blog Manager, Billing Manager, etc.

granular-permissions.comment: Role-based only; no per-page or per-field permissions

sso-saml.comment: Enterprise only: SSO via Okta, Azure AD, Google SAML, ClassLink

team-collaboration.comment: Real-time collaboration, built-in chat, 'Needs Review' status for blog posts

audience-restrictions.comment: Member Sites feature enables paywalled/gated content with subscription tiers

typescript-sdk.comment: No official SDK; REST API accessed directly

content-type-sdk.comment: No programmatic content type definition; UI-based only

cli-tools.comment: Development Server CLI for local template development

local-development.comment: Local development server available; Git-based template versioning

webhooks.comment: Webhook Subscriptions API for Commerce events

plugin-system.comment: Extensions marketplace; custom code injection available

admin-ui-customization.comment: Admin interface cannot be customized; only site frontend via templates

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive help center, developer docs, video tutorials; Commerce API well-documented

frontend-frameworks.comment: Traditional coupled architecture; not designed for headless frontend integration

preview-mode.comment: Page drafts preview available on Enterprise; blog drafts on all plans

ecommerce-integration.comment: Built-in e-commerce with Squarespace Payments, Stripe, PayPal; subscriptions, digital products

analytics-integration.comment: Built-in analytics; Google Analytics integration available

ai-features.comment: Blueprint AI site builder, AI copy writer, product descriptions, SEO optimization, email campaigns

cdn-included.comment: Built-in CDN for all assets and page delivery

response-caching.comment: CDN-level caching for static assets and pages

rate-limits.comment: Commerce APIs available on Core, Plus, Advanced plans; specific limits not published

global-regions.comment: Global CDN distribution; specific region selection not available

free-tier.comment: 14-day free trial only; no permanent free tier

pricing-model.comment: Tiered plans: Basic $16/mo, Core $23/mo, Plus $39/mo, Advanced $52/mo (annual); Enterprise custom pricing

commercial-support.comment: 24/7 customer support; Enterprise gets priority support and account management

enterprise-features.comment: SSO/SAML, page drafts, multi-site management, 99.9% uptime SLA, SCIM provisioning, SOC 2 Type II
